title: stemonuraceae
intro: The Stemonuraceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of evergreen trees and shrubs that are native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. Members of the Stemonuraceae family are characterized by their simple leaves and small, often fragrant flowers. This family is relatively small, containing only a few genera, but is significant in the diversity of plant life in tropical ecosystems. The Stemonuraceae family is part of the order Aquifoliales, and is closely related to other families such as the Icacinaceae and the Ebenaceae.
